message:
test: add integration tests for API middleware pipeline → security intent firewall

Add comprehensive integration test suite validating the full API request
lifecycle from middleware chain through the security intent firewall subsystem.

Test coverage includes:
- Auth → firewall pipeline: verify authenticated and unauthenticated requests
  are correctly gated before security subsystem evaluation
- Rate limiting integration: validate per-endpoint-group rate limits interact
  correctly with firewall verdicts under concurrent load
- Policy hook enforcement: test that endpoint-specific policy hooks (e.g.
  fleet.quarantine.write requiring fleet-admin role) reject unauthorized
  callers before firewall evaluation
- Audit event consistency: confirm the full pipeline produces consistent
  audit trail entries and decision receipts for both allowed and denied
  requests across all endpoint groups (FleetControl, Operator, etc.)
- Firewall verdict propagation: ensure firewall Allow/Deny/Quarantine
  verdicts correctly flow back through the middleware chain response

Helpers include: make_effect(), make_firewall(), fleet_admin_route(), and
operator_status_route() fixture constructors for ergonomic test setup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
